name: Megachem (Thailand) Public Company Limited
summary: Megachem (Thailand) Public Company Limited engages in the distribution of specialty chemicals in Thailand. The company offers performance coating products; polymers and advanced polymer composite products; surface technology products; oil and gas related products; and lifestyle biotech products. It also operates in Australia, China, India, Indonesia, Malaysia, the Philippines, the United Arab Emirates, Singapore, Vietnam, and England. The company was founded in 1992 and is based in Bangkok, Thailand.
